Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}But yeah, Emiri is— Oh, that's Ms. Kanou's first name. Anyway, Emiri's really popular with the guys.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}And I kinda took her away from them, y'know? Like, she became my girl before they even had a chance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Turns out Emiri's a really strict teacher when it comes to grades.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 1 25 25}At home, though, she's a real sweetheart! I love how her attitude changes when she's with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Yeah, good-looking people just flock together, y'know? It's like a law of attraction.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 13 2 5 101}Aw, hey, I didn't mean to hit a nerve! C'mon, don't worry. We're still gonna hang out, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 13 2 15 101}I know, right!? It's like we're actually in a TV show![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Hey, I'm just messing around, man! Don't take me so seriously![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Anyway, what about you, {f 4 1}? Make any progress with Takeba-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I feel guilty hogging all the happiness, so I'm gonna wish for you to be happy, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}And hey, don't tell anyone about me and Emiri, okay? 'Cause teachers aren't allowed to date students.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Shoot, look at the time. I'm way behind on my favorite show.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 1 25 25}Well, I guess that's because real life is way better than any show right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think Tomochika's ever[n]going to stop talking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I ended the conversation at[n]a good spot and went home.[n]{f 1 1}
